author: Chamille Doss
review: Excellence and Professionalism! Top 5 Percent, LLC job well done! In September 2023, Labor Day Weekend we celebrated our 51st annual family reunion, we were expecting up to 200 relatives. The family reunion planning committee searched custom T-shirts vendors, and the prices we were finding, didn't match the quality being offered. I'd previously ... in the fall of 2022 purchased two custom long-sleeved shirts from T5P, very pleased with the quality and price. I needed the shirts within a couple of days, for an important event, and Ezra made it happen! I discussed with my family to consider using T5P for our family reunion t-shirts. Months prior to the family reunion we met to discuss colors, style, and pricing. During this time, Ezra provided his expert opinion so we could make the best decision based on our budget, with different textures, styles, and pricing of t-shirts. We landed on ordering - 150 plus t-shirts and received bulk pricing, this included t-shirts for toddlers, and onesies for an infants too. In addition we were in need of several 2x's-3x's t-shirts these available as well. I provided the custom logo designed with our family symbol. Ezra worked with us to ensure the best combination of color and font styles were perfect. We were so very appreciative, the results were well done! The process from start to finish was excellent! Ezra remained in continued communication with us, from pricing, invoicing, and payments, along with all t-shirts being completed on-time. Shout-out to T5P! Excellent! Thank you for a job well done!  read more

I placed an order for T-Shirts that I had a very tight deadline for, I didn’t have an exact concept only an idea. They took my idea produced the concept and completed my order in a very timely manner all while maintaining an excellent level of communication to make sure I was getting exactly what I wanted. I’m very very happy with every aspect of Top 5%. I will be bringing future business their way- hopefully without the extreme time deadlines and lack of concept.
